revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Name (+ "clan") [default: page name] | surname nihongo = Kanji | image = File:X | image size = image size in pixels | image caption = caption for image | home province = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | parent house = Name & Wikilink | titles = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | founder = Name & Wikilink | final ruler = Name & Wikilink | current head = Name & Wikilink | founding year = YYYY | dissolution = YYYY | ruled until = YYYY (+ reason) | cadet branches = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. == Example == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Example Name | surname nihongo = Example kanji | image = File:Japanese crest Sagari Fuji.svg | image size = | image caption = Example caption | home province = Example province | parent house = Example Clan | titles = Shogun | founder = Example no Example | final ruler = Example Example | current head = Example | founding year = 10XX | dissolution = 11XX | ruled until = 1112 (killed by pirates) | cadet branches = None }} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject Anthroponymy templates|Japanese clan]] [[Category:Surnames]] [[Category:Japan infobox templates|Clan]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Name (+ "clan") [default: page name] | surname nihongo = Kanji | image = File:X | image size = image size in pixels | image caption = caption for image | home province = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | parent house = Name & Wikilink | titles = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | founder = Name & Wikilink | final ruler = Name & Wikilink | current head = Name & Wikilink | founding year = YYYY | dissolution = YYYY | ruled until = YYYY (+ reason) | cadet branches = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. == Example == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Example Name | surname nihongo = Example kanji | image = File:Japanese crest Sagari Fuji.svg | image size = | image caption = Example caption | home province = Example province | parent house = Example Clan | titles = Shogun | founder = Example no Example | final ruler = Example Example | current head = Example | founding year = 10XX | dissolution = 11XX | ruled until = 1112 (killed by pirates) | cadet branches = None }} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject Anthroponymy templates|Japanese clan]] [[Category:Surnames]] [[Category:Japan infobox templates|Clan]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Name (+ "clan") [default: page name] | surname nihongo = Kanji | image = File:X | image size = image size in pixels | image caption = caption for image | home province = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | parent house = Name & Wikilink | titles = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | founder = Name & Wikilink | final ruler = Name & Wikilink | current head = Name & Wikilink | founding year = YYYY | dissolution = YYYY | ruled until = YYYY (+ reason) | cadet branches = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. == Example == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Example Name | surname nihongo = Example kanji | image = File:Japanese crest Sagari Fuji.svg | image size = | image caption = Example caption | home province = Example province | parent house = Example Clan | titles = Shogun | founder = Example no Example | final ruler = Example Example | current head = Example | founding year = 10XX | dissolution = 11XX | ruled until = 1112 (killed by pirates) | cadet branches = None }} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject Anthroponymy templates|Japanese clan]] [[Category:Surnames]] [[Category:Japan infobox templates|Clan]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Name (+ "clan") [default: page name] | surname nihongo = Kanji | image = File:X | image size = image size in pixels | image caption = caption for image | home province = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | parent house = Name & Wikilink | titles = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | founder = Name & Wikilink | final ruler = Name & Wikilink | current head = Name & Wikilink | founding year = YYYY | dissolution = YYYY | ruled until = YYYY (+ reason) | cadet branches = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. == Example == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Example Name | surname nihongo = Example kanji | image = File:Japanese crest Sagari Fuji.svg | image size = | image caption = Example caption | home province = Example province | parent house = Example Clan | titles = Shogun | founder = Example no Example | final ruler = Example Example | current head = Example | founding year = 10XX | dissolution = 11XX | ruled until = 1112 (killed by pirates) | cadet branches = None }} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject Anthroponymy templates|Japanese clan]] [[Category:Surnames]] [[Category:Japan infobox templates|Clan]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Name (+ "clan") [default: page name] | surname nihongo = Kanji | image = File:X | image size = image size in pixels | image caption = caption for image | home province = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | parent house = Name & Wikilink | titles = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | founder = Name & Wikilink | final ruler = Name & Wikilink | current head = Name & Wikilink | founding year = YYYY | dissolution = YYYY | ruled until = YYYY (+ reason) | cadet branches = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. == Example == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Example Name | surname nihongo = Example kanji | image = File:Japanese crest Sagari Fuji.svg | image size = | image caption = Example caption | home province = Example province | parent house = Example Clan | titles = Shogun | founder = Example no Example | final ruler = Example Example | current head = Example | founding year = 10XX | dissolution = 11XX | ruled until = 1112 (killed by pirates) | cadet branches = None }} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:WikiProject Anthroponymy templates|Japanese clan]] [[Category:Surnames]] [[Category:Japan infobox templates|Clan]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Name (+ "clan") [default: page name] | surname nihongo = Kanji | image = File:X | image size = image size in pixels | image caption = caption for image | home province = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | parent house = Name & Wikilink | titles = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. | founder = Name & Wikilink | final ruler = Name & Wikilink | current head = Name & Wikilink | founding year = YYYY | dissolution = YYYY | ruled until = YYYY (+ reason) | cadet branches = Name & Wikilink
Name & Wikilink etc. == Example == {{Infobox Japanese clan | surname = Example Name | surname nihongo = Example kanji | image = File:Japanese crest Sagari Fuji.svg | image size = | image caption = Example caption | home province = Example province | parent house = Example Clan | titles = Shogun | founder = Example no Example | final ruler = Example Example | current head = Example | founding year = 10XX | dissolution = 11XX | ruled until = 1112 (killed by pirates) | cadet branches = None }} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:WikiProject Anthroponymy templates|Japanese clan]] [[Category:Surnames]] [[Category:Japan infobox templates|Clan]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
